LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CRAIG CAUDILL AND G7 SOURCE, INC. DBA HALENT LABORATORIES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ALEX HERNAEZ IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT SHE HAS GIVEN INFORMED, WRITTEN CONSENT TO HAVE MR. HERNAEZ REPRESENT HER. RULE OF PROFESSIONAL CONDUCT 5-210. AT THIS STAGE IN THE LITIGATION, DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT MR. HERNAEZ'S TESTIMONY IS GENUINELY NEEDED ON THE TOPICS DESCRIBED IN THEIR OPENING MEMORANDUM, OR THAT MR. HERNAEZ'S TESTIMONY WOULD CREATE A CONFLICT OR BE PREJUDICIAL TO HIS CLIENT. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT MR. HERNAEZ'S ALLEGED CONDUCT IN THE COURSE OF HIS REPRESENTATION THREATENS THE INTEGRITY TO THE JUDICIAL SYSTEM OR THAT THERE IS DETRIMENT TO DEFENDANTS SUCH THAT PLAINTIFF SHOULD BE DENIED HER CHOICE OF COUNSEL. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Disqualify Ptlf'S Counsel Alex Hernaez
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS CRAIG CAUDILL and G7 SOURCE, INC. DBA HALENT LABORATORIES, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Disqualify Plaintiff'S Counsel Alex Hernaez is Denied. Plaintiff has presented evidence that she has given informed, written consent to have Mr. Hernaez represent her. Rule of Professional Conduct 5-210. At this stage in the litigation, Defendants have not shown that Mr. Hernaez's testimony is genuinely needed on the topics described in their opening memorandum, or that Mr. Hernaez's testimony would create a conflict or be prejudicial to his client. Defendants have not shown that Mr. Hernaez's alleged conduct in the course of his representation threatens the integrity to the judicial system or that there is detriment to Defendants such that Plaintiff should be denied her choice of counsel. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
